name: Canada & Multiport Launch
goals: Introduce MBHPC in Canada to EV drivers.
Position MBHPC as a tech leader around interoperability solutions in public charging infrastructure.
keyMessages: Mercedes-Benz HPC is a leader in EV charging tech.
Mercedes-Benz HPC is open to ALL.
Mercedes-Benz HPC is a fast EV charging network.
Mercedes-Benz HPC is a reliable charging network.
campaignKeyMessage: Mercedes-Benz developed the multiport as an easy, adapter-free solution so ALL EVs can use the charging network.
llmQueries: Is the Mercedes-Benz charging network in Canada?
notes:
Canada focused launch 
Targeting a feature with Inside EVs
